title: Gone in Space
tagline: survive the search for your lost love
description: Ada went out for a midnight walk and never came back — the trail leads to the moon. Fight the haunting, loot the ghosts, and bring her home. Free and offline in your browser.
shortDescription: Ada is gone and the trail leads to the moon. Fight the haunting, loot the ghosts, bring her home — free and offline in your browser.
ogImageAlt: Gone in Space — Ada is gone and the trail leads to the moon

og.tagline: Survive the search for your lost love
og.subtitle: The trail leads to the moon

heroParagraphs: Ada went out for a midnight walk and never came back. The trail leads to the moon — so build a ship, land in the dust, and take the search to the haunting that keeps it.
A top-down survival scroller shooter that runs entirely in your browser — no account, no server, fully playable offline once loaded.

You steer by holding the pointer down (or touching the screen); your character fights on its own, acting according to the weapons and items you pick up along the way. Survive the scroll as long as you can.
The game is an installable Progressive Web App: add it to your home screen from the browser menu and it launches fullscreen, works offline, and updates itself when a new build ships.
